sentences.translation: Madžid je slomio olovku dok je pisao.
sentences.translationEn: Majid broke his pen while writing.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنْ صَدِيقِهِ أَنْ يُعِيرَهُ قَلَمًا آخَرَ.
sentences.translation: Zamolio je prijatelja da mu posudi drugu olovku.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his friend to lend him another pen.

sentences.translation: Prijatelj mu je dao novu olovku s osmijehom.
sentences.translationEn: His friend gave him a new pen with a smile.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَهُ مَاجِدٌ وَاسْتَمَرَّ فِي كِتَابَةِ الوَاجِبِ.
sentences.translation: Madžid mu se zahvalio i nastavio pisati zadaću.
sentences.translationEn: Majid thanked him and continued writing the assignment.
